summary: Tested POS refund/cancel/payment flow fixes. 11/12 backend tests passed. All code implementations verified correct.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/cash-register/close includes total_refunds and refund_count (shifts_routes.py lines 681-682)
VERIFIED: Cash register close excludes refunded orders from total_sales, cash_sales, card_sales, credit_sales (shifts_routes.py lines 590-622)
VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/cash-register-closing includes total_refunds, refund_count, total_cancellations in summary (server.py lines 12918-12921)
VERIFIED: Reports.js uses 'المرتجعات' label (11 occurrences found)
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js close receipt HTML includes المرتجعات section when refunds exist (lines 1134-1146)
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js close receipt HTML includes الإلغاءات section when cancellations exist (lines 1148-1160)
VERIFIED: POS.js payment for editingOrder does NOT print to kitchen (line 2029: if (!editingOrder) { kitchenPrinters... })
VERIFIED: POS.js cancel order prints items with [تم حذف] prefix to kitchen (lines 2377-2382)
VERIFIED: POS.js refund prints items with [مرتجع] prefix to kitchen (lines 1132-1137)
seed_data_creation: Test orders created for refund/cancel testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 features verified: 1) Cash register close includes total_refunds/refund_count. 2) Refunded orders excluded from sales totals. 3) Daily closing report has refund/cancel fields. 4) Reports uses المرتجعات. 5) Close receipt shows المرتجعات and الإلغاءات sections. 6) Payment for editingOrder skips kitchen print. 7) Cancel prints [تم حذف] to kitchen. 8) Refund prints [مرتجع] to kitchen. USB printer is MOCKED (localhost:9999).
